dict.string: VibeMap needs your location to show which areas you've explored.
VibeMap tracks your exploration continuously to map the areas you've discovered.
VibeMap tracks your exploration even when the app is closed, so you never miss discovered areas.
VibeMap uses your motion activity to save battery by pausing GPS when you are stationary.
VibeMap reads your Garmin workout routes from Apple Health to retroactively scratch hexes from past activities.
